basics.name: David Castrillón Gonzales
basics.label: Senior Full-Stack Developer (React, TypeScript, Node.js, Go)
basics.summary: Senior Full-Stack Developer with strong frontend architecture expertise and backend ownership in Node.js and Go. Experienced in micro-frontend architecture, SSR applications, REST API development, and automated testing. Strong product mindset with proven ownership building internal platforms (backoffice, reporting) and improving financial reconciliation workflows. Uses AI-assisted engineering workflows to improve delivery speed and solution quality.

work.name: Yuno
work.summary: Full-stack development across reconciliation and data products using React, TypeScript, React Query, Vite microfrontends, and Node.js.
highlights: Tech stack: React, TypeScript, React Query, Vite (microfrontends), Node.js, React Router v7 (Remix-based SSR), Tailwind CSS, ShadCN UI, Zustand, Vitest.
Improved the reconciliation product through multiple workflow enhancements using React, TypeScript, React Query, and Vite in a micro-frontend architecture.
Designed and implemented a user-configurable alerting feature for reconciliation events (e.g., missing settlements / missing liquidations).
Contributing to the reconciliation product redesign, focusing on UX improvements and maintainable frontend architecture.
Built the backend for a reporting product enabling report template creation and scheduled email delivery; owned most of the backend implementation (Node.js, REST APIs).
Established the architecture for a company-wide Backoffice SSR application; initial scaffolding adopted by multiple teams.
Applied AI-assisted development workflows across design, implementation, debugging, and documentation to improve engineering productivity.

work.name: Conekta
work.summary: Back-office product development using React, TypeScript, Chakra UI, Material UI, with full-stack collaboration in Go and Node.js.
highlights: Tech stack: React, TypeScript, Chakra UI, Material UI, Go, Node.js, REST APIs.
Maintained and evolved the back-office application using React and TypeScript.
Delivered new product functionality and improved operational workflows.
Collaborated with backend teams using Go and Node.js; integrated REST APIs end-to-end.
Contributed to UI consistency and component patterns using Chakra UI and Material UI.

work.name: Mercado Libre
work.summary: Frontend development for large-scale products using React and TypeScript.
highlights: Tech stack: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS.
Contributed to the migration of an insurance application, delivering features using React and TypeScript.
Worked in distributed agile teams and large-scale codebases.

work.name: Bancolombia
work.summary: Test automation for web, mobile, and services using Selenium, Appium, Rest Assured, Cucumber, and Java (AS400).
highlights: Tech stack: Selenium, Appium, Rest Assured, Cucumber, Java, AS400.
Led testing teams and defined test automation strategies.
Built automated tests for web, mobile, and APIs using Selenium, Appium, and Rest Assured.
Created automated batch testing processes using AS400 libraries in Java.
